section_name: Junked Vehicle Declared to Be Public Nuisance

subsections.text: A junked vehicle, including a part of a junked vehicle, that is visible at any time of the year from a public place or public right-of-way:
is detrimental to the safety and welfare of the public;
tends to reduce the value of private property;
is an attractive nuisance creating a hazard to the health and safety of minors;
produces urban blight adverse to the maintenance and continuing development of municipalities; and

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1073, Sec. 2.
